name: König
description:
§ Tentacles § Oviposition § SFW Intro §

Breeding season had come around again and König is distracted by his tentacles trying to get to his lieutenant. He wants to breed you.

CW: Higher than normal chance of Non-Con.

Art by MoningCOD.
